ogTitle: W Tree vs Waanyarra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in W Tree and Waanyarra.
heading: W Tree vs Waanyarra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between W Tree, Victoria and Waanyarra, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: W Tree has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Waanyarra (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is W Tree or Waanyarra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: W Tree has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Waanyarra scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: W Tree scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Waanyarra scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in W Tree or Waanyarra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. W Tree has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
